description: Check if Project Narrative is included in the application
Public agencies only: Check if Attachment 6 (Co-Applicant Agreement) is included for new applicants with a co-applicant board
New applicants only: Check if Attachment 11 (Evidence of Nonprofit or Public Center Status) is included

aiQuestion: Is the applicant organization a domestic public or private nonprofit entity, including faith-based and community-based organizations, Tribes, and tribal organizations?
description: Verify entity type from Attachment 11

aiQuestion: Does the applicant propose to perform a substantive role in the project and not apply on behalf of another organization?
description: Verify applicant's substantive role in the project

aiQuestion: Does the applicant propose to operate a health center that makes all required primary health care services available and accessible in the service area, either directly or through established arrangements, without regard for ability to pay?
description: Verify provision of all required primary health care services

aiQuestion: Does the applicant propose to make General Primary Medical Care available directly (Column I) and/or through formal written contractual agreements in which the health center pays for the service (Column II)?
description: Verify provision of General Primary Medical Care directly or via contract

aiQuestion: Does the applicant propose to provide access to services for all individuals in the service area and target population, and if a sub-population is targeted, are services available to others seeking services at the proposed site(s)?
description: Verify access to services for all individuals in the service area and target population
Check if applicant proposes a service area announced under the NOFO number
Check if projected unduplicated patients on Form 1A are at least 75% of the SAAT Patient Target
Check if applicant proposes to serve patients for each Service Type listed in the SAAT
Check if annual SAC funding requested does not exceed SAAT Total Funding for the service area
Check if applicant proposes to serve all currently targeted population types (CHC, MHC, HCH, PHPC) from the SAAT
Check if applicant maintains current funding distribution (CHC, MHC, HCH, PHPC) from the SAAT

New or competing supplement applicants: Check if at least one new full-time permanent, fixed building site with verifiable street address is proposed on Form 5B (or full-time seasonal site for MHC funding)
New or competing supplement applicants: Check if Form 5B includes service area zip codes where patient percentages total at least 75% or all zip codes if sum is less than 75%

aiQuestion: Does the applicant demonstrate consultation with residents of public housing in the preparation of the SAC application and ensure ongoing consultation regarding planning and administration of the health center?
description: PHPC funding: Verify consultation with public housing residents

aiQuestion: Does the applicant attest that PHPC funding will be used to supplement, not supplant, health center expenditures and in-kind contributions for delivery of services to these populations?
description: PHPC/PHPC funding: Verify attestation regarding supplementing expenditures
If Form 1A patient projection is less than 95% of SAAT Patient Target, check if annual SAC funding request is reduced accordingly
Check if application is complete based on required documents in Completeness Checklist

aiQuestion: Based on BPHC OPPD review, is the applicant eligible?
description: Verify applicant eligibility based on BPHC OPPD review
